channel.title: Social Engineering on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Social Engineering on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Security
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Security" , "Malware" , "Wireless Security" , "Windows Security" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Social Engineering" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn physical and logical security, Windows security settings, wireless protocols, malware, social engineering, and hardening.

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003): Attacks and Exploits
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Exploitation" , "Web Application Attacks" , "Wireless Attacks" , "Social Engineering" , "Cloud Attacks" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master attacks and exploits for the CompTIA PenTest+ PT0-003 exam. Learn network, host, web, authentication, wireless, social engineering, cloud, and specialized system attacks plus scripting.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Threats, Vulnerabilities, and Mitigations
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Threat Analysis" , "Vulnerabilities" , "Malware" , "Social Engineering" , "Attack Vectors" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Mitigation" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master threats, vulnerabilities, and mitigations for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn threat actors, attack vectors, vulnerability types, malicious indicators, and mitigation techniques.

item.title: EC-Council CEH Course: Complete Study Guide for the Certified Ethical Hacker v13 Exam
item.category: "CEH Course" , "Certified Ethical Hacker" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "EC-Council Certification" , "Network Security" , "Web Application Security" , "Malware Analysis" , "Social Engineering" , "Cryptography"
item.description: A comprehensive EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) study course covering all 20 modules: ethical hacking methodology, footprinting, scanning, enumeration, system hacking, malware, web attacks, wireless attacks, cloud security, and cryptography.

item.title: Why User Training Trumps Advanced Tech in Cybersecurity
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "User Training" , "Digital Security" , "Data Protection" , "Phishing Prevention" , "Social Engineering" , "Regulatory Compliance" , "Employee Education" , "Online Safety" , "Information Security"
item.description: Discover why 'User Training is More Critical Than Advanced Tech' in cybersecurity, and how it strengthens your digital defenses effortlessly.

item.title: Mastering Penetration Testing: Advanced Techniques and Real-World Examples for Cybersecurity Professionals
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Penetration Testing" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Network Security" , "Web Application Security" , "Wireless Security" , "Social Engineering" , "Mobile Application Security" , "Cloud Security" , "Career Development"
item.description: Explore advanced techniques, tools, and real-world examples in mastering penetration testing to enhance your cybersecurity skills and career.
